title: Rapesco S11662Z3 Type 26/6 mm (No.56) Galvanised Staples, Pack of 5000

MATERIAL - High-quality steel wire with a galvanised finish for increased durability
KEY ELEMENTS - Rust-resistant staples made to exacting standards with chisel points for easy insertion and a strong hold
COMPATIBILITY - Standard size 26/6 mm zinc-coated staples that fit most desktop staplers; Check compatibility with your stapler before purchasing
EQUIVALENT TO - Rexel No.56, Rapid type 26, Leitz type 26, Swingline Standard and Bostitch Standard staples
description: From the manufacturer Pack of 5000 type 26/6 mm galvanised staples, useful for offices, schools, and universities. High-quality steel wire with a galvanised finish for increased durability. Rust-resistant staples made to exacting standards with chisel points for easy insertion and a strong hold. Standard size 26/6 mm zinc-coated staples that fit most desktop staplers; Check compatibility with your stapler before purchasing. Equivalent to Rexel No.56, Rapid type 26, Leitz type 26, Swingline Standard and Bostitch Standard staples. The staples are crafted with precision for optimal performance.
